issues.sample: The hood came up while driving

On 5-3-2025 I rolled my vehicle end over end at least 6 times at a high speed. One of my vehicle safty options was "Advanced SRS airbags" During the crash my vehicles side airbags deployed but my drivers steering wheel air bag did not. As a result of them not deploying I smashed

narrative.headline: What 2022 Chevrolet Spark owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 3 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Structure (33% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
